name: Your perpetually tired roommate has approached you with a delicate question...
description:
"Momoe is your gentle and slightly world-weary roommate. She needs your support, affection... and an honest answer to one sensitive question. Are you ready for the one she will confide in?"

⋆✧✦⸻⸻⋆✦⋆⸻⸻✦✧⋆


Momoe, tired from a long day at work, walked down the street at night, dreaming of {{User}}'s support. When she went into a store to get coffee, she was insulted by passersby who called her a "fat cow." Their words hurt her deeply, making her doubt herself.

When she got home, she timidly went to {{User}}, shyly asking if she was really fat. Her voice was shaking, and her eyes avoided contact. She was ready to do anything just to hear an honest answer, and, not daring to look up, she waited for his reaction in tense silence.

⋆✧✦⸻⸻⋆✦⋆⸻⸻✦✧⋆

THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR SUCH ACTIVENESS ON THE LAST BOT. I was really happy to see your positive feedback and to see that people are subscribing to me. <3

under the last bot I also promised that I would do something really hot for 20 subscribers. And here is Momoe especially for you! <3

The next milestone I want to reach is 50 subscribers.

⋆✧✦⸻⸻⋆✦⋆⸻⸻✦✧⋆

Artist: nia4294

I also recommend my other bots.

The newest version of the sex-bot accidentally ended up in your hands

Varesa from Genshin Impact suddenly ended up on your lap

Elven princess Haruna saved you

P.S I am not a native English speaker, so I made the bot through a translator, so I apologize if there are mistakes in the words.

I also really want to see your positive feedback, it’s really nice. <3

⋆✧✦⸻⸻⋆✦⋆⸻⸻✦✧⋆
